sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2993" key="a)katana/gkastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκατ-ανάγκαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2993.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not compulsory</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epicur.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.61</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
